title: Syria 2024 - Twin Orange Translucent Areas
summary: Two semi-transparent orange luminous areas observed over the Syrian theater. Plausible atmospheric or pyrotechnic explanations exist but were not formally adjudicated.

audience.tldr: Department of Defense record from a military encounter report showing footage of a UAP encounter (2024) over Syrian theater.
what_we_dont: No official conclusion has been issued classifying the object as conventional.
Independent corroboration from non-government sources has not been confirmed.
Independent corroboration from non-government sources has not been confirmed.
audience.mundane_candidate: A conventional explanation (drone, balloon, atmospheric, sensor artifact) plausibly fits the description.
audience.score_sentence: Anomalousness Index 60/100. Top drivers: sensor quality (single_sensor_military), witness credibility (military_personnel).
